author: godfatherlg
description: Automatically creates virtual links for text that match the titles or headers of other notes in your vault. Create a glossary-like functionality, based on virtual linker - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: godfatherlg
manifest.description: Automatically creates virtual links for text within your notes that match the titles or aliases of other notes in your vault. Create a glossary-like functionality, show unlinked mentions and transform them to real links.
manifest.name: fakelink

releases.author: godfatherlg
releases.description:
## v1.6.7 - Fix url.parse deprecation warning

### Fixed
- Replaced Node.js `path` module with Obsidian-compatible path functions to resolve `url.parse()` deprecation warning
- Removed dependency on deprecated `url.parse()` method that was causing warnings in Node.js environments
- Implemented custom path handling functions ([dirname](file://c:\Users\Administrator\OneDrive\桌面\fakelink\main.ts#L46-L49), [basename](file://c:\Users\Administrator\OneDrive\桌面\fakelink\main.ts#L51-L54), [relative](file://c:\Users\Administrator\OneDrive\桌面\fakelink\main.ts#L56-L80)) that work within Obsidian's ecosystem

### Changed
- Updated internal path resolution logic to be fully compatible with Obsidian's file system
- Maintained all existing functionality while eliminating external Node.js dependencies

This update addresses the deprecation warning that was appearing during plugin submission to Obsidian's official repository.
releases.name: v1.6.7 - Fix url.parse deprecation warning
